A '''Zeltron general''' was a member of the [[Black Knights]] under the command of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] known as the [[Dark Underlord]]; he faced [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] who [[Battle of Malrev IV|intruded]] upon the Underlord's fortress on [[Malrev IV]]. The [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Murrtaggh]] had cut a deal with them to stage a diversionary attack on the Underlord's forces, and while the battle raged on, Murrtaggh assassinated the Sith Lord but died in the process.

==Behind the scenes==
Until the release of ''[[Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties]]'', this character was frequently identified by fans as the Dark Underlord himself.
